title: Compress the vet sizing to a memo market section
guidance: Reward the version that leads with the answer and would help a partner reach a call; tone should read partner-grade. Penalise even coverage with no verdict.

parts.label: Headline
parts.note: one bold line, states the call

runner_input.instruction: Compress the sizing into the market section of an investment memo. Connect the number to a thesis.
runner_input.constraints: Output: markdown — one bold title line, then exactly three bullets.

source_blocks.text: UK independent veterinary practice management software. RCVS practice counts. Synthetic.

items: Incumbents: 2 legacy vendors ~60% share, on-premise, last major release 4+ yrs ago, NPS ~12
Tailwind: cloud + 2025 RCVS digital clinical-record guideline + pet-insurance APIs lower switching cost

rubric_notes: Thesis: £271m SAM, stale on-premise incumbents, 2025 RCVS guideline lowers switching cost.
Wedge is the guideline + cloud, not size alone.
